properties.remark: SEVERAL TREES BLOWN DOWN AT BEAVER CREEK GOLF COURSE
MULTIPLE TREES DOWN. DIAMETER OF TREES ESTIMATED AT ABOUT ONE FOOT AT BASE. 15 POWER POLES DOWN WITH 4000 FEET OF LINE TO BE REPLACED. POWER OUT TO RESIDENTS SINCE SAT PM...WILL BE RESTORED MON AM.
STRONG WINDS KNOCKED OVER 8 INCH DIAMETER TREE
RADAR ESTIMATE 2 TO 4 INCHES RAIN FELL...FLASH FLOODING REPORTED IN JUNIPER WOOD HOUSING ADDITION BY YAVAPAI COUNTY SHERIFFS OFFICE.
RADAR ESTIMATE 2 TO 4 INCHES RAIN FELL...FLASH FLOODING REPORTED IN JUNIPER WOOD HOUSING ADDITION BY YAVAPAI COUNTY SHERIFFS OFFICE.

3 HOMES DESTROYED NEAR SUPAI VILLAGE. FOOT BRIDGES ALSO DESTROYED.
